reason: Every xcodebuild project mode fails before reading Spoonjoy.xcodeproj because com.apple.dt.IDESimulatorFoundation cannot load against the installed /Library/Developer/PrivateFrameworks/DVTDownloads.framework.

failedCommands.command: xcodebuild -project Spoonjoy.xcodeproj -scheme Spoonjoy -configuration BootstrapDebug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO SWIFT_TREAT_WARNINGS_AS_ERRORS=YES GCC_TREAT_WARNINGS_AS_ERRORS=YES build

xcodebuild -project Spoonjoy.xcodeproj -scheme Spoonjoy -configuration BootstrapDebug -destination 'generic/platform=macOS' CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO SWIFT_TREAT_WARNINGS_AS_ERRORS=YES GCC_TREAT_WARNINGS_AS_ERRORS=YES build
xcodebuild -project Spoonjoy.xcodeproj -target 'Spoonjoy macOS' -configuration BootstrapDebug -sdk macosx CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build

repairAttempts.detail: Non-privileged first-launch repair produced no output and was terminated after hanging.
Passwordless sudo is unavailable, so the agent cannot run privileged first-launch repair.

reviewerFindingsAddressed.finding: Generated project contained version-pinned SDK framework paths for iPhoneOS18.0 Foundation.framework and MacOSX15.0 Cocoa.framework.
reviewerFindingsAddressed.resolution: Generator now removes xcodeproj default Foundation/Cocoa framework references from app targets and the project contract rejects version-pinned SDK framework paths.

requiredResolution: Run privileged Xcode first-launch repair or reinstall/update Xcode so /Library/Developer private frameworks match Xcode 26.5, then rerun the exact iOS and macOS BootstrapDebug xcodebuild commands.
